title: Internal Error: ../V3DfgPeephole.cpp:1387: Width mismatch
body:
I faced an internal error on Verilator 5.002 on macOS Monterey 12.6.1. (Verilator was installed via homebrew).
I have tested the master branch version (8d61cea366057f0a8537d09168a3377f095784ab) of Verilator, but I got the same result.

I was compiling a generated Verilog HDL source code by my DNN hardware synthesis compiler https://github.com/NNgen/nngen (v1.3.4-rc branch, c2e49419412558b0c16df678fa6d331e8af63f6c).

This is a minimal example obtained from the original problem code. (`test.v`)

``` verilog
module top
  (
   input [7:0] din,
   output [7:0] dout
   );

  wire cond;
  assign cond = din > 1 && din < 254;

  wire tmp_out;
  assign tmp_out = ((cond)? 0 : 1) && 1;

  assign dout = tmp_out? 100 : 200;

endmodule
```

I executed the following command.

```bash
verilator --lint-only test.v
```

The following result was obtained.

```
%Error: Internal Error: test.v:12:27: ../V3DfgPeephole.cpp:1387: Width mismatch
   12 |   assign tmp_out = ((cond)? 0 : 1) && 1;
      |                           ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```

Thank you very much for the development of the wonderful hardware tool.
